code:
%%{Logistics_Warehouse}}}%%
gantt
    title Resource Allocation Timeline
    dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
    section Planning & Architecture
    Technical Architecture Document    :a1, 2025-01-01, 14d
    UI/UX Design                       :a2, after a1, 21d
    Technical Spikes                   :a3, after a1, 28d

    section Core Development
    Database Schema Implementation     :b1, after a1, 14d
    Authentication & Authorization     :b2, after b1, 14d
    User & Team Management             :b3, after b2, 21d
    Category Management                :b4, after b3, 14d
    Todo Management                    :b5, after b4, 14d
    Admin Portal (Logistics_StockLevel)            :b6, after b2, 28d

    section Advanced Features
    Advanced Team & Category Management :c1, after b4, 14d
    Blogging Feature                   :c2, after b5, 21d
    Basic Chat Functionality           :c3, after b3, 21d
    Advanced Chat Features             :c4, after c3, 28d
    Public API                         :c5, after c2, 21d
    Advanced Reporting                 :c6, after c5, 21d

    section Testing & Refinement
    Performance Optimization           :d1, after c4, 14d
    Security Testing                   :d2, after c5, 14d
    User Acceptance Testing            :d3, after d1, 14d

    section Deployment & Training
    Production Deployment              :e1, after d3, 7d
    User Training                      :e2, after e1, 14d
repo_description: Free and Open Source ERP platform
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为这个物流仓库管理系统制定一个完整的资源分配时间线。我建议分成五个阶段：规划架构、核心开发、高级功能、测试优化，最后是部署培训。你觉得这个框架合理吗？
框架很清晰。我注意到您特别强调了物流库存管理（Logistics_StockLevel），这个Admin Portal应该是业务核心。我先把五个section建起来，然后咱们填充具体任务。
对，Admin Portal确实关键。核心开发这块，我想先做Database Schema Implementation，然后是Authentication & Authorization，这两个是基础设施。接着再做User & Team Management、Category Management和Todo Management。
确认一下依赖关系：Database Schema做完才能做Authentication，Authentication做完才能做User & Team Management。那Category和Todo是依赖User & Team Management，还是可以直接跟Authentication并行？
Category和Todo都依赖User & Team Management，因为需要先建好用户体系。另外Admin Portal（Logistics_StockLevel）可以跟Category Management并行启动，但依赖Authentication。这样Auth完成后，User管理和Admin Portal可以两条线并行推进。
好的，核心开发的依赖链已经理清了。现在来高级功能部分，您列了Advanced Team & Category Management、Blogging、Basic Chat这些，它们的先后关系是？

Advanced Team & Category依赖基础的Category Management做完。Basic Chat依赖User & Team Management，Advanced Chat Features又依赖Basic Chat。Blogging可以等Todo Management完成后开始，然后Public API要等Blogging做完，Advanced Reporting最后依赖Public API。
测试阶段我理解为：Performance Optimization要等Advanced Chat Features完成，Security Testing等Public API完成，User Acceptance Testing等Performance Optimization完成。最后Production Deployment接UAT，User Training接部署。这个顺序对吗？
完全正确。另外规划阶段我漏说了，Technical Architecture Document是起点，后面UI/UX Design和Technical Spikes都依赖它，但这两个可以并行。时间跨度上Architecture 14天，UI/UX 21天，Spikes 28天。
所有section和任务都已录入，依赖关系也设置好了。我检查一下：核心开发里Admin Portal 28天，从Authentication之后开始，与Category Management并行。整个时间线从2025年1月1日启动，看起来覆盖了完整的物流仓库系统建设周期。
